task: Add a /dashboard route to the binayah-news-scraper service at /Users/zoop/binayah-news-scraper that serves a clean HTML dashboard showing all scraped articles. Fetch from GET /news?limit=200 on load. Show articles as cards in a responsive grid (title, source badge, date, clickable link). Filter buttons across the top for each source (All, Gulf News, Khaleej Times, Reuters, etc.). Search box to filter by keyword in title. Show total article count. Clean, dark professional design (dark background, white cards with subtle border). No frameworks — pure HTML/CSS/JS served as a string from the Node.js server. Deploy to Render after building (service ID: srv-d7kcvd8sfn5c73buqpog).
